label: The Cinder Oath
description: The Cinder Oath occupies a recessed vault off Ebonwake Transit Spire’s numbered concourse, its basalt-clad walls marked with stamped bulkhead-seals and sainted lintels salvaged from earlier refits. A low, armored bar of riveted plasteel dominates the room beneath lumen strips dimmed to preserve night-vision discipline, while vox-baffles mute the transit alarms into a constant mechanical undertone. Gallery slits of shielded glass admit a jaundiced view of the launch shaft’s haze and landing lights, and the air remains sharp with promethium residue and recirculated metal. Quarantine placards and ration boards are fixed to the entry bulkhead, enforcing the Spire’s austere order even in leisure.
